vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼fMtkbu pSust½ yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ ftlds fy, 'kqYd lans; gS lsD'ku dk fMtkbu pSust* bankSj ftys xkao lksuok; ds ikl 4-000 fd-eh- ¼fo|eku 16-600 fd-eh- ½ ij 29-300 0-000 fd-eh- ls 29-300 fd-eh- rd /kkj ftys esa xkao [ky?kkV ds ikl 75-700 fd-eh- ¼fo|eku 32-800 fd-eh-½ ij 48-020 29-300 fd-eh- ls 77-320 fd-eh- rd ;ksx 77-320 *fo|eku pSust ds vuqlkj] ifj;kstuk dk [k.M 12-600 fd-eh- ls 84-700 fd-eh- rd gSA ^^ [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@480@09&10@lhvks@thlh&bankSj¼bankSj&[ky?kkV½chvksVh] yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd June, 2016 S.O. 2180(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 & 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the Use of Section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 2070(E) dated 07.08.2009, authorized M/s. Oriental Pathways (Indore) Private Ltd. to collect and retain the fee for the development, operation and maintenance of the existing two lane road into four lane road from Km. 12.600 to Km. 84.700 ( Indore - Khalghat section) of the National Highway No. 3 in the State of Madhya Pradesh; Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 & 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide S.O. 2070(E) dated 07.08.2009:- Para 2 of the Notes may be substituted as follows: “2. The fee shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plaza for the length specified for such Toll Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza (Design chainage) Length (in km.) for which fee is payable Design Chainage of the section* At km 4.000 (existing km. 16.600) near Village Sonvay in District Indore 29.300 Km. 0.000 to km. 29.300 At km 75.700 (existing km. 82.800) near Village Khalghat in District Dhar 48.020 Km. 29.300 to km. 77.320 Total 77.320 *As per existing chainage, the project stretch is from km. 12.600 to km. 84.700. ” [F. No. NHAI/13013/480/09-10/CO/GC-Indore (Indore-Khalghat) BOT] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by the Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
